# Expedited Delivery

Expedited delivery is a shipping option that ensures arrival within two business days for an additional fee of twelve dollars. To qualify for same-day shipping, orders must be placed by 2 PM local time; any orders placed afterward will be shipped the following morning. This option is not available for oversized freight items or for shipments to locations outside the contiguous United States.

[Source: shipping_options.md#expedited-delivery]
